validation.command: cd ios && xcodebuild build -scheme LaneShadow -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 16'

cd ios && xcodebuild test -scheme LaneShadow -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 16' -only-testing:LaneShadowTests/LSBottomSheetTests/test_small_detent_uses_overlay_surface_tokens -only-testing:LaneShadowTests/LSBottomSheetTests/test_medium_and_large_detents_resolve_correct_fractions -only-testing:LaneShadowTests/LSBottomSheetTests/test_drag_dismiss_fires_ondismiss_once -only-testing:LaneShadowTests/LSToastTests/test_all_four_variants_resolve_status_tokens_and_motion_recipe -only-testing:LaneShadowTests/LSToastTests/test_auto_dismiss_fires_after_motion_recipe_duration -only-testing:LaneShadowTests/LSModalTests/test_modal_composes_button_atoms_and_secondary_dismisses -only-testing:LaneShadowTests/LSBottomSheetTests/test_overlay_molecule_stories_registered
cd ios && xcodebuild test -scheme LaneShadow -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 16'
validation.notes: First attempt failed with a simulator launch preflight Busy error in UI tests. After resetting simulator state with xcrun simctl shutdown all and rerunning the exact command, the suite passed.

red: Initial project generation failed until the new molecule, story, and test files existed in the paths declared by ios/project.yml.
The first targeted xcodebuild test run exposed implementation issues in LSBottomSheet and LSModal plus a brittle detent source assertion in LSBottomSheetTests.
The first full xcodebuild test run failed in existing UI tests with a simulator launch preflight Busy error.
green: Implemented LSBottomSheet on native SwiftUI .sheet with the required 0.25, 0.5, and 0.9 detents and overlay surface token usage.
Implemented LSToast with token-backed motion recipes, Task.sleep-based auto dismiss, and status token variants.
Implemented LSModal with LSText title/body composition, LSButton action composition, and overlay surface token background.
Registered all new overlay stories in MoleculesStories and added file membership through ios/project.yml plus generated project output.
All required lint, targeted tests, grep gates, build, and the retried full test suite passed.

residual_risks: The full test suite required one simulator reset before UI tests launched cleanly; this looked environmental rather than molecule-related, but it is worth watching in CI or repeated local runs.
